purpose: Keep Git governance human documentation thin and routed while machine truth remains in system/git-governance-system.json.

baseline_doc.role: Thin human entrypoint for Git governance

doc_routes.role: Thin read order and operating boundary
doc_routes.boundary: Explains where Git governance starts and points to machine truth.
Explains GitHub publication readiness and remote-action approval boundary.

split_policy.baseline_doc_rule: docs/git-governance/README.md stays thin and routes to system/git-governance-system.json.
split_policy.technical_docs_rule: GitHub publication checklist remains under docs/technical because it is an operations publication topic.
split_policy.growth_trigger: Add separate docs only when Git governance gains CI, release, branching, changelog or contribution workflows.
